deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ "$SERVICE_TYPE" = "frontend" ]; then python -m streamlit run wms_project/streamlit_frontend/app.py --server.port ${PORT:-8501} --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.headless true; else python wms_project/django_backend/manage.py migrate && gunicorn --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} wsgi:application; fi'
